function.arguments:
{"command": "# Check pip for nc_chipgen entry points
cat /home/user/.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/nc_chipgen-0.1.0.dist-info/entry_points.txt 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
# Check if there's a verify subcommand in the package (maybe it's in a newer version)
grep -r "verify" /nc/apps/nc_chipgen/ --include="*.py" 2>/dev/null | grep -v pycache | head -20"}
function.name: execute_bash
